narrative:
Monroe / Pike (precinct in Madison County) has 1,300 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.8 percentage points.
